title: 02 The Body - Kayagasati Sutta MN131.To play the media you will need to either update your browser to a recent version or update yourFlash plugin
justification: This talk provides the most comprehensive and systematic coverage of the body in meditation, directly following the Kayagatasati Sutta structure. It covers breath meditation, postures, full awareness, the 32 parts contemplation, the four elements, and charnel ground meditations with rich anecdotes (urine therapy, Mr. Crapper, mortuary visits) and practical guidance. The talk balances technical instruction with Bhante's characteristic humor and personal stories, making it ideal as a spine text that can accommodate supplementary material on specific aspects.
summary: A detailed exposition of the Kayagatasati Sutta covering all major body contemplations: breath, postures, mindful activities, the 32 body parts, four elements, and charnel ground meditations. Bhante weaves scientific facts about the body with traditional teachings, personal anecdotes, and practical meditation guidance throughout.

relevance.note: Comprehensive teaching on mindfulness of body meditation practices
